infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: CareCompanion reads your health records to help manage cancer care — including medications, lab results, and appointments from your care team.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: CareCompanion saves care data to help you track your treatment progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CareCompanion uses the camera to scan medical documents and prescriptions.

plugins.cameraPermission: CareCompanion uses the camera to scan medical documents.
